ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND EXHIBIT A

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES  CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION #22 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ASTRON DEVELOPMENT CORP., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $132,362.44 PRINCIPAL, $642.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $941.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $133,946.09, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR # 7489

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - CONCHITA LOZANO-BATISTA OF THE WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510) 337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489
